title: Treat plant pests, diseases and disorders
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Treat plant pests, diseases and disorders demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to treat plant pests, diseases and disorders

pcs.text: Identify and record details of pest, disease or disorder and confirm with supervisor according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record details of pest, disease or disorder and confirm with supervisor according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record details of pest, disease or disorder and confirm with supervisor according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Discuss and select appropriate control technique with the supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss and select appropriate control technique with the supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss and select appropriate control technique with the supervisor.

pcs.text: Perform calculations according to control option and treatment requirements and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform calculations according to control option and treatment requirements and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform calculations according to control option and treatment requirements and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Select and prepare equipment for use according to workplace procedures, supervisor instructions and manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare equipment for use according to workplace procedures, supervisor instructions and manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare equipment for use according to workplace procedures, supervisor instructions and manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Secure treatment area according to health and safety in the workplace procedures and supervisors instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Secure treatment area according to health and safety in the workplace procedures and supervisors instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Secure treatment area according to health and safety in the workplace procedures and supervisors instructions.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards and risks in the workplace and apply appropriate controls according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards and risks in the workplace and apply appropriate controls according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards and risks in the workplace and apply appropriate controls according to supervisor instructions.

elements.title: Apply treatments to plant pests, diseases and disorders

pcs.text: Identify, select, fit and use personal protective equipment according to according to workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, select, fit and use personal protective equipment according to according to workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, select, fit and use personal protective equipment according to according to workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Prepare treatments according to supervisor's instructions, chemical label instructions, safety data sheets and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare treatments according to supervisor's instructions, chemical label instructions, safety data sheets and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare treatments according to supervisor's instructions, chemical label instructions, safety data sheets and manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Apply treatments to minimise damage and exposure to off-target species according to workplace procedures, health and safety in the workplace and environmental legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply treatments to minimise damage and exposure to off-target species according to workplace procedures, health and safety in the workplace and environmental legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply treatments to minimise damage and exposure to off-target species according to workplace procedures, health and safety in the workplace and environmental legislative and regulatory requirements.

elements.title: Carry out post treatment operation

pcs.text: Clean and store personal protective equipment and application equipment according to workplace and environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and store personal protective equipment and application equipment according to workplace and environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and store personal protective equipment and application equipment according to workplace and environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Dispose of treatment waste according to environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of treatment waste according to environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of treatment waste according to environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain records according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements.
